description_long: This is a rectangular, upright trash bin with a dark green top section and a gray lower body. The front face features a prominent recycling symbol in green, indicating its intended use for recyclable materials. The top section has a large, rectangular opening for depositing waste, which is recessed and bordered by the green lid. The sides and back of the bin are plain, with no visible handles, wheels, or additional markings. The surface appears to be made of a durable, matte-finished material, likely metal or heavy-duty plastic. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for public urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or city streets.
description: A rectangular, green-and-gray recycling trash bin with a front recycling symbol and a recessed top opening.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recycling symbol and the large, recessed opening for waste disposal.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, two-tone surface with no visible openings or markings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, two-tone surface without any symbols or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain surface and no visible features.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Front face displays a green recycling symbol.
